Editorial

Why small artworks work beautifully together

Whether Petites or Darlings, small formats are designed to be grouped. Their modest scale invites play — rearrange, layer, and revisit until a wall feels unmistakably yours.

Pairs that converse

Two small works hung side by side create a quiet rhythm — ideal above a console or nightstand.

Grids with intent

A 2×2 quartet brings structure to a blank wall while keeping each piece intimate and collectible.

Gallery walls, gently

Mix orientations and let negative space breathe. Small formats forgive experimentation.
